commands: Expand the target market demographics to include older consumers, such as Generation X and Baby Boomers, who are also increasingly health-conscious and likely to invest in health-oriented products.
Incorporate a broader analysis of consumer behavior across different age groups to ensure a comprehensive understanding of potential demand.
Include qualitative assessments on how lifestyle choices and health awareness vary among different demographics, not just millennials and Gen Z.
Consider the impact of regional preferences and cultural factors on beverage consumption, which could influence demand beyond the specified age groups.
